status_quo: Readmission rates are reported 23% lower than actual because discharge-to-readmit linkage breaks silently across three dashboards. Leadership trusts the numbers, allocates nursing resources based on understated risk, and submits inaccurate quality reports to CMS.
with_bayesiq: BayesIQ reconciles discharge and readmission records end-to-end, surfaces the 7 broken metrics across 3 dashboards, and delivers a governed trust score that moves from 34 to 81 — giving your quality team a single source of truth before the next reporting cycle.
headline_finding: Readmission rates reported 23% lower than actual — 7 broken metrics across 3 dashboards went undetected.
